---
title: "2026 Summer Workshop - Agentic Engineering"
description: "2026 agentic engineering workshop by John Helveston and Pingfan Hu, George Washington University"
open-graph:
  image: images/card.png
toc: false
grid:                                  
  sidebar-width: 0px
  margin-width: 0px
---

<hr>

```{=html}
<div class="affiliation">
 <a class="affiliation-logo-link" href="https://trustworthyai.gwu.edu" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <img src="images/gw-tai-logo.png" alt="GW TAI Logo" class="affiliation-logo">
 </a>
 <span class="affiliation-text">The George Washington University</span>
</div>
```

<hr>

## Part 1: [Agentic Basics](agentic-basics.qmd)

{{< include resources/part-1-overview.qmd >}}

## Part 2: [Skill Usage and Design](skill-usage-and-design.qmd)

{{< include resources/part-2-overview.qmd >}}

## Part 3: [Data Safety with AI](data-safety-with-ai.qmd)

{{< include resources/part-3-overview.qmd >}}
